chain_of_thought: The earnings call provided limited information on environmental initiatives, with a mention of delays due to environmental issues. Social aspects were more prominent, focusing on patient-centric strategies and clinical differentiation. Governance was addressed through discussions on regulatory integration and transparency, but lacked depth in specific governance practices.
